title: Promotion order: executable check first, critical-patterns prose fallback
action: Per D6: compounding's Promote Criticals step states the order — a twice-seen review finding or user correction promotes FIRST to an executable check (a grep/lint line in the area's verify command, a lib guard, a hook denial); critical-patterns.md prose is the fallback for what cannot be mechanized, because prose taxes every session preamble and relies on being read. Reference gets the short decision tree; grooming's proposal section notes promote-to-check proposals ride tiny/small lanes. CREATION-LOG note citing docs/09 item 3.

truths: The three existing promotion criteria stay intact; check-first is about the TARGET, not the bar

trace.outcome: Promotion step renamed Check First Prose Second with the mechanize-first rule; decision tree added to reference; grooming lane note added (guard-blocking changes never tiny); three promotion criteria untouched. SKILL.md at 115 lines.
